caption: A man named Basil Chapman appears in a video recording against a plain, light-colored wall. He has grey hair and wears a black t-shirt and a headset with a thin wire running down his side. He is speaking, with his facial expressions and mouth position shifting slightly across the sequence. A blue graphic banner spans the lower portion of the screen. In the first two frames, the banner contains the text "Basil Chapman" and "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022". In the latter two frames, the banner updates to display "Basil Chapman" and a phone number, "1-877-927-6648". The logo "Tiger-TV" is visible in the upper right and middle right sections of the screen. To the right of the man, a small portion of a desk with some blue folders or papers is partially visible.
